creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to q5sys from comment #0)
Thank you for your report and using qmmp through my port.

I'm working for new stable versions that consist of qmmp-1.0.x series
on Qt5 and qmmp-0.9.x series on Qt4, so that multimedia/qmmp to be
updated soon.  The upstream has these two stable versions and two
developing versions 1.1.x and 0.10.x together.

FreeBSD port for the version 1.0.0 is ready to be released
at my test build repository: https://github.com/liangtai/FreeBSD-ports .
You may find 16 branches here, include 'cmake' branch that is similar
to the official port tree.  Qt5 build is ready at either 'qt5/cmake'
or 'qt5/qmake' branches.  Of course 'separated/*' branches also work
well, I hope, and any comments and requests are welcome.

I have a plan to the both versions live together by escaping all files
of the version 0.9.x series with suffixing '-qt4', then move it on
a new multimedia/qmmp-qt4 port.  Now my Qt4 qmake build (master branch)
is almost completed on this plan and will be added in my GitHub
repository soon.
